output: Batch 3 executed. T3, T6, T7, and T12 are complete in the current repository state. I added projection/property coverage, expanded regression tests around guarded edit paths and grouped track moves, verified the commit-boundary projection wiring, and checkpointed the batch. Targeted verification now passes aside from the known pre-existing `TimelineCanvas` pinned-overlay test the brief said to leave alone.
deviations: `src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineCanvas.test.tsx` still has the known pre-existing failing case `renders all shot groups with solid borders and always shows the shot name label`; I left it untouched per the brief.

The underlying source changes for T3, T7, and T12 were already present in the worktree when this batch started, so this turn focused on verification and regression coverage rather than additional source edits for those tasks.

task_updates.executor_notes: Verified commit-boundary projection is wired in both required places. `buildDataFromCurrentRegistry` projects immediately after `repairConfig(migrateToFlatTracks(...))`, and `useTimelineCommit.applyEdit` projects incoming `'config'` and `'pinnedShotGroups'` edits before rebuilding data. Added regression coverage for both the save-path projection and the `applyEdit` boundary projection.

Added `pinned-group-projection.test.ts` covering projection, both group builders, `moveGroup` clamping, `resizeGroupEdge` scaling, `replaceGroupChildren`, legacy migration idempotence, and a deterministic random-sequence cohesion property check.

Verified the shared interaction-state ref remains a local `useRef` in `TimelineEditor.tsx`, with drag writes flipping true only after the movement threshold and resize writes mirroring the existing start/end resize lifecycle. Added regression tests that assert the drag and resize flags toggle symmetrically.

Verified grouped delete and split are blocked through the shared `useClipEditing` handlers with the required error toast, while grouped ArrowUp/ArrowDown movement reroutes through `moveGroup` in `moveSelectedClipsToTrack`. Added tests for the guarded delete/split paths and the grouped track-move reroute.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed `projectPinnedShotGroups` runs in `buildDataFromCurrentRegistry` before `resolvedConfig` is built and in `applyEdit` for both `'config'` and `'pinnedShotGroups'`. Grep did not find another raw-config row-materialization bypass; `buildTimelineData` already projects as well.
Confirmed the new projection test file runs deterministic random sequences of `moveGroup`, `resizeGroupEdge`, and `replaceGroupChildren` and asserts cohesion-by-construction after every step.

Confirmed `interactionStateRef` is still a local `useRef` in `TimelineEditor.tsx`, drag flips true only after threshold crossing and resets on cleanup, and resize flips true/false symmetrically with resize start/end.

Confirmed grouped Delete and split are blocked through the shared `useClipEditing` path with the required toast, while grouped ArrowUp/ArrowDown reroute through `moveGroup` via `moveSelectedClipsToTrack`.
